summary: Completed comprehensive testing of frontend UI/UX refactor to premium SaaS look with horizontal category tabs and label replacement. Backend APIs remain fully functional with 100% test success rate.

integration_issues.issue: Direct navigation to /store?category=audit-optimize redirects to /store without maintaining category parameter

passed_tests: Backend API health check (21/21 endpoints passing)
Premium SaaS store page with hero section and horizontal category tabs
Label replacement: 'Start Here' successfully replaced with 'Zoho Express Setup'
Category tab clicking functionality (changes category content)
Product detail pages with breadcrumbs, hero, outcome strip, and sticky purchase summary
Pricing input configuration on calculator products (hours pack)
Navigation to Portal, Admin, and Cart pages without regression
Product offerings grid display with proper pricing
No dropdown categories present in UI - successfully using horizontal tabs
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Category URL routing via /store?category=... parameter is not working, though category tab clicking works correctly. This is a low-priority enhancement as the core functionality works.
